rules.name: AIGO – Experiment Spec
rules.description: When an Experiment is created or transitioned to AI Triage, run the AI Experiment Design Agent and post the draft spec. Does not launch anything.

value.prompt: Draft an experiment spec: hypothesis, audience/segment, channel, variants, primary metric, secondary metrics, guardrails, sample size note, runtime, tracking, decision rule, readout template, approvals. If no measurable primary metric exists, mark not ready. Do not launch.

value.body:
🤖 AI Growth Ops — Experiment Spec (draft; launch requires human go/no-go)

{{agentResponse}}
